title: District Zero - Episode 1

frames.prompt_used: Black seawater slams against a colossal seawall wrapped in defensive lights. Beyond it, the drowned skeleton of the old megacity disappears into storm and darkness, in EXT. DISTRICT ZERO OUTER WALL - NIGHT. night lighting. cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded

The wall hums with power. Search beams sweep across the waves like prison lights, in EXT. DISTRICT ZERO OUTER WALL - NIGHT. night lighting. cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded

Nara Voss runs through a narrow maintenance corridor with a toolkit strapped across her back. Emergency lights pulse red over wet metal grates, in INT. LOWER TRANSIT STACK - SERVICE CORRIDOR - NIGHT. night lighting. NARA cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded

Her wrist display flashes: PRESSURE DROP - SECTOR C-19, in INT. LOWER TRANSIT STACK - SERVICE CORRIDOR - NIGHT. night lighting. NARA cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded

She moves with the reflexes of someone who has spent her life inside failing machinery, in INT. LOWER TRANSIT STACK - SERVICE CORRIDOR - NIGHT. night lighting. NARA cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded

The map of the lower stack flickers. One sealed maintenance route for a fraction of a second, then disappears, in INT. LOWER TRANSIT STACK - SERVICE CORRIDOR - NIGHT. night lighting. NARA cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded
Nara stops, in INT. LOWER TRANSIT STACK - SERVICE CORRIDOR - NIGHT. night lighting. NARA cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded
Her eyes narrow, in INT. LOWER TRANSIT STACK - SERVICE CORRIDOR - NIGHT. night lighting. NARA cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded

She screenshots the flicker before the display resets, in INT. LOWER TRANSIT STACK - SERVICE CORRIDOR - NIGHT. night lighting. NARA cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded

Steam hisses from a cracked pipe assembly. Two exhausted workers wait at the far end of the chamber, afraid to get too close, in INT. PRESSURE VALVE CHAMBER - NIGHT. night lighting. WORKER cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded

Nara kneels beside the main valve, opens a manual bypass, and stabilizes the pressure line with practiced speed, in INT. PRESSURE VALVE CHAMBER - NIGHT. night lighting. WORKER cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded
The red alarm dies. White light returns, in INT. PRESSURE VALVE CHAMBER - NIGHT. night lighting. WORKER cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded

Nara barely reacts. Her attention stays on the hidden route image still glowing on her wrist, in INT. PRESSURE VALVE CHAMBER - NIGHT. night lighting. WORKER cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded
That answer lands badly with her, in INT. PRESSURE VALVE CHAMBER - NIGHT. night lighting. WORKER cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded

A tiny apartment built into old structural concrete. Pipes run along the ceiling. Filtered city light leaks through a narrow slit window, in INT. VOSS APARTMENT - LOWER STACK - LATE NIGHT. night lighting. NARA cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded

Elian Voss sits at the kitchen table, repairing an obsolete circuit board with shaking hands, in INT. VOSS APARTMENT - LOWER STACK - LATE NIGHT. night lighting. NARA cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded

Nara drops her toolkit and places her wrist display in front of him, in INT. VOSS APARTMENT - LOWER STACK - LATE NIGHT. night lighting. NARA cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded

The deleted route. Sector C-19. Access spine attached to an unlisted gate, in INT. VOSS APARTMENT - LOWER STACK - LATE NIGHT. night lighting. NARA cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded
Elian freezes before he can hide it, in INT. VOSS APARTMENT - LOWER STACK - LATE NIGHT. night lighting. NARA cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded
Silence, in INT. VOSS APARTMENT - LOWER STACK - LATE NIGHT. night lighting. NARA cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded

Nara studies him. This is not fear in the abstract. This is memory, in INT. VOSS APARTMENT - LOWER STACK - LATE NIGHT. night lighting. NARA cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded
Elian lowers his voice, in INT. VOSS APARTMENT - LOWER STACK - LATE NIGHT. night lighting. NARA cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded

Clean marble surfaces. Vertical gardens. Public screens. Citizens in neutral uniforms pass through controlled light like a commercial for civilization, in INT. CIVIC ATRIUM - DISTRICT ZERO CENTRAL CORE - MORNING. interior lighting. ROOK (ON SCREEN) cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded

On a giant screen, Director Halden Rook addresses the district with reassuring authority, in INT. CIVIC ATRIUM - DISTRICT ZERO CENTRAL CORE - MORNING. interior lighting. ROOK (ON SCREEN) cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded

Commander Sarin Vale watches from a glass balcony above the crowd. Still. Analytical. He does not watch the speech. He watches reactions, in INT. CIVIC ATRIUM - DISTRICT ZERO CENTRAL CORE - MORNING. interior lighting. ROOK (ON SCREEN) cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded

An illegal signal market lives inside an abandoned ventilation chamber beneath the transit network. Smugglers trade in batteries, access codes, raw medicine, and forbidden data, in INT. BLACK MARKET EXCHANGE - VENTILATION SUBLEVEL - DAY. day lighting. MIRA cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded

Mira Sol leans behind a makeshift counter of cracked screens and signal relays, in INT. BLACK MARKET EXCHANGE - VENTILATION SUBLEVEL - DAY. day lighting. MIRA cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded
Nara shows her the captured route, in INT. BLACK MARKET EXCHANGE - VENTILATION SUBLEVEL - DAY. day lighting. MIRA cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded

Mira scans the image, then looks up sharply, in INT. BLACK MARKET EXCHANGE - VENTILATION SUBLEVEL - DAY. day lighting. MIRA cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded

Mira overlays stolen archive fragments onto Nara's map, in INT. BLACK MARKET EXCHANGE - VENTILATION SUBLEVEL - DAY. day lighting. MIRA cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded

Rows of analysts monitor citizen movement, utility flow, and predictive risk models across the district, in INT. SECURITY OPERATIONS CENTER - DAY. day lighting. ANALYST cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded

Nara and Mira descend through an unmarked shaft and enter a long corridor buried in the skeleton of the old city. The air is colder here. The metal is older. No civic branding. No surveillance stickers. No official color codes, in INT. SEALED SERVICE SPINE - NIGHT. night lighting. MIRA cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded
Only old warning paint and layers of dust, in INT. SEALED SERVICE SPINE - NIGHT. night lighting. MIRA cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded

Mira works on a buried control panel while Nara keeps watch, in INT. SEALED SERVICE SPINE - NIGHT. night lighting. MIRA cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded
The panel comes alive, in INT. SEALED SERVICE SPINE - NIGHT. night lighting. MIRA cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded
Nara feels the floor vibrate beneath her boots, in INT. SEALED SERVICE SPINE - NIGHT. night lighting. MIRA cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded

Beyond the glass: not wasteland. Not total ruin, in INT. EXTERNAL OBSERVATION CHAMBER - CONTINUOUS. interior lighting. NARA cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded

In the distance, across black water and broken towers, there are lights. Organized lights. Moving traffic. Life, in INT. EXTERNAL OBSERVATION CHAMBER - CONTINUOUS. interior lighting. NARA cinematic storyboard, 16:9 aspect ratio, film grain, anamorphic lens, color graded
